{"id":"project-LICHEN-6lxb","title":"TUI format_time_us doesn't handle negative time values","description":"file: python/src/lichen/tui/app.py:45-59

The format_time_us function doesn't validate that time_us is non-negative. If a negative value is passed (e.g., from a time calculation error or rollover), it produces confusing output like '-500us' or '-1.234s' rather than returning a sentinel like '--'.

Example:
  format_time_us(-500)  # Returns '-500us' instead of '--' or similar

While simulation time should never be negative, defensive handling would prevent confusing display output if a calculation error occurs upstream.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:06:35.377593Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T17:06:35.377619Z"}
